name: Salmon in Potato Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the potatoes, onion, tarragon, salt, and pepper.
Place one salmon fillet on wax paper; press half of the potato mixture evenly over it.
Carefully turn the salmon over and repeat with the remaining potato mixture.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large nonstick skillet.
Place the salmon in the skillet; cook 4 minutes on each side, or until the potatoes are golden.
